title: Plus One Collection for HSN | Projects Part Two
excerpt: The other day I shared some amazing DIY projects from other bloggers featuring my latest collection, Plus One. Today I'm continuing to share the love by giving you a sneak peek of three amazing crafts designed by some other folks.…
body:
The other day I shared some amazing DIY projects from other bloggers featuring my latest collection, Plus One. Today I'm continuing to share the love by giving you a sneak peek of three amazing crafts designed by some other folks.

DIY Daily Calendar + White Board by Jen of My Daylights

Window Memo Board by Karen of Dogs Don't Eat Pizza

Toy Bin Labels by Carissa of Carissa Miss

P.S. On March 24th, I'll be sharing my Plus One Collection on HSN. The shows will be on air live at 10am and 3pm EST! There will be five discounted kits for sale...you won't want to miss it!
